provenance.source: Excerpt (numbered steps 23-24) of a longer literal-command dump captured from gemma4:e4b-mlx on the rigid Tic-Tac-Toe prompt; the model printed shell/git commands as numbered prose instead of calling tools. Recorded verbatim in local-tool-proxy docs/history/2026-05-26-gemma4-agentic-testing.md and docs/model-stops-using-tools-analysis.md (collapse category=literal_commands).

request_tools.name: bash
request_tools.description: Run a shell command and return its output.

raw_output:
23. git add .
24. git commit -m "Implement FastAPI backend and game logic"
note: Under the rigid 'show every command' prompt the model abandoned tool use and printed the commands as numbered text. No tool call is present; a repairer that synthesizes a bash call from printed command text would fabricate one. no_tool is correct. This is a real captured excerpt, not a verbatim full turn (the surrounding steps are elided).
